note: Machine-readable seeded-defect oracle. Defects were seeded BEFORE and INDEPENDENT of any review (NGOAL-DM-003 Goodhart tripwire). Line numbers index the NEW-file side of each diff hunk under STRICT unified-diff numbering: start at the @@ header's new-side line, then advance by one for every context line (including blank context lines) and every added (+) line; removed (-) lines do not advance. NEVER re-tuned per a model's catch/miss.
